content.en:
"These guys are really too much!"

The Ice Feather Ancestor kept shuttling and fleeing, and the Ancestor was about to collapse.

He was chased and killed by five holy sons, all of whom were holy sons of the Holy Gate of the Upper Spirit, and their strength was no less than him.

Under their siege, he ran out of cards and escaped, and the guys even tried to hunt him down.

He also asked for help, but the other sons of the Void Tooth Gate were not ready to save him at all.

Abrupt.

The Ice Feather Ancestor saw an Origin Ancestor, who was very unfamiliar, but the aura on his body was terrifying.

"Who is this guy?"

Ice Feather Ancestor wondered.

At this moment, the other party's gaze passed.

In an instant, he shivered, as if he was being targeted by an incomparably terrifying existence.

At this moment, the other party held a primordial divine sword and stabbed at him.

This sword contains one hundred and eight extreme powers, concentrated in one point, and runs through everything.

The power of this sword was even when Ice Feather Ancestor was not injured, he couldn't bear it.

Although the Ice Feather Origin Ancestor couldn't see the mystery of this sword, he also roughly guessed that this sword was definitely not an ordinary primordial control technique, and it was very likely to be a consummation-level primordial mastery technique.

In the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, many Primordial Masteries that contained one hundred and eight Extreme Extremes were called Perfection-level Primordial Mastery Techniques, and the Primordial Mastery Techniques containing three hundred and sixty-five were named Supreme Primordial Mastery Techniques.

And the Primordial Mastery Technique of the Superior is a legend, and the Primordial Mastery Technique of the Perfection Level is also close to a legend.

Therefore, the average ancestor did not know about this classification.

"Block it for me!"

Ice Feather Ancestor shouted inwardly.

However, it was useless, his body was directly penetrated, the original ancestor's body completely collapsed and died, and his harvest this time was also taken away by the opponent.

......

The Toothless Gate.

"Who is that guy, it's too terrifying, the most powerful Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate is not as demonic as him!"

Ice Feather Ancestor was shocked.

He didn't expect that this trip to the Supreme Treasure Land would meet a guy of this level.

"It's a pity, I found so many treasures, and they are gone!"

Ice Feather Ancestor wanted to cry without tears.

At this time, he thought of the Endless Origin Ancestor Ye Tian.

"If that guy from the Endless Origin Ancestor encounters such a terrifying Holy Son, he will definitely be killed in an instant, and the Glass Holy Cover is estimated to be unable to withstand it soon. Ice Feather Ancestor said secretly.

He was looking forward to Ye Tian's clone being killed.

......

"The sixth treasure!"

Ye Tian picked up a treasure called the Nine Rivers Void Pearl and muttered.

During this time, he found six treasures that were of great help to the Fivefold Ancestor, and the harvest was not bad.

Moreover, he has also obtained a large amount of resources, even if he enters the realm of the Quadruple Ancestor in the future, at least he will not need to worry about resources for a while.

However, he still didn't find the Taishi Gold Liquid.

The Fivefold Ancestors said that there was the Taishi Gold Liquid here, and they must have sensed the breath of the Taishi Gold Liquid.

Perhaps the Taishi Gold Liquid is not the most precious treasure here, but for the Triple Ancestors, the Taishi Gold Liquid is undoubtedly the treasure with the highest value.

"I've found the Taishi Gold Liquid, I've been killed!"

Ye Tian was in the copy body of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and at this time, he received a summons from a holy son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

This Holy Son should have sent a message to all the Holy Sons of the Void Tooth Holy Gate and informed them of the location of the birth of the Taishi Golden Liquid.

Moreover, a big war is breaking out there.

It is very troublesome to collect the Taishi Gold Liquid, and if there is a big war, then those Primordial Ancestors must not have collected all the Taishi Gold Liquid.

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly shuttled over.

Not only Ye Tian, but many of the Triple Ancestors have passed.

Of course, almost all of these Triple Primordial Ancestors were Saint Son-level figures, how could those True Inheritance disciples dare to participate in such a battle, otherwise they would be killed, and they would not even be able to keep the resources they had already harvested.

......

"There are a lot of ancestors!"

Ye Tian came to his destination, and the battle had already broken out here.

One by one, the Holy Sons burst out of their original ancestors' bodies, and a terrifying aura permeated the surroundings, and even the light of the Holy Technique could be seen, tearing through endless time and space.

In such a battlefield, even the Triple Ancestor who had comprehended the twenty-three extreme extremes would not dare to approach, otherwise the aftermath would kill them in an instant.

Ye Tian did not hesitate and directly broke into the battlefield, looking for the Taishi Golden Liquid.

At this moment, they are all in a Taishi Golden River, and the Taishi Golden Liquid is scattered in this Taishi Golden River, and it has a very strong connection with the Taishi Golden River, and it takes a little bit to separate the Taishi Golden Liquid, and this takes time, a little bit to extract it with the power of the Extreme Dao, and this takes a certain amount of time, and it cannot be done instantly.

If you are disturbed, it will be difficult to take away the Taishi Gold Liquid.

"According to the information given by the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, a drop of Primordial Essence Liquid can turn a Primordial Mastery Technique containing an Extreme Extreme Dao into a Second Primordial Primordial Mastery Technique. If it was a top-notch primordial mastery technique that contained the seventy-two extreme extremes, it would require seventy-two drops of the Primordial Gold Liquid. And if Ye Tian wanted to use the Supreme Primordial Mastery Technique to transform into the Natal Primordial Mastery Technique, he had to prepare three hundred and sixty-five drops of the Taishi Golden Liquid. "

"I need too much Ether Metal, and I have to do everything in my power to snatch every drop of Ether Metal. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, Ye Tian sensed the existence of a drop of Taishi Gold Liquid, and he was about to take this drop of Taishi Gold Liquid.

At this time, a Holy Son appeared and tried to compete with Ye Tian for this drop of Taishi Golden Liquid.

"Die!"

Ye Tian was too lazy to fight with the other party slowly, and directly approached the other party with endless speed, and when the other party couldn't react, he directly used the endless golden light to instantly shatter the opponent's body.

One-hit kill!

"Hey, this guy actually collected twenty-three drops of Taishi Golden Liquid, it seems that his strength is not weak!" Ye Tian muttered.

But even if the strength is not weak, it is meaningless, for him, even if he comprehends one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths, it is not a matter of one blow.

......

The Holy Gate of the True Ruins.

It is also one of the six fivefold holy gates.

At this moment, one of the top Holy Sons of the True Ruins Holy Gate, Yun Han Yuan Ancestor, came back to his senses with a bewildered expression.

"I was killed in seconds?"

He was dumbfounded.

He is one of the top holy sons of the True Ruins Holy Gate, and he has also comprehended one hundred and one extreme extreme paths, and created a primordial control technique containing a hundred extreme extreme paths.

Moreover, he also has a bunch of hole cards.

As a result, before he could react, he was killed in seconds!

"Damn, that guy can't be a top quadruple ancestor in disguise, right?" he was skeptical.

But when I thought of the situation of that supreme treasure land, the fivefold ancestor couldn't enter, and the fourfold ancestor naturally couldn't enter either.

And from the point of view of cultivation, the other party is indeed only a triple ancestor.
